title: HORIZONS
description: The Horizons Project is a modpack created for rubius. Released so that others can enjoy the same experience as well.
body:
<details><summary>Credits</summary>
  
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

[Mod List](https://modrinth.com/modpack/horizons1/version/1.4.6)

</summary></details>

## **Horizons es el tan esperado modpack de la serie de Rubius!** 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JvHIjLTtNSU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Read below for english desc :)

Ahora podrás disfrutar de todo el contenido de la serie con mods característicos como Distant Horizons, Terralith/Tectonic, Iris shaders, Bosses de Destrucción Masiva, y más, que te darán una experiencia vanilla ![cluless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a564fd55ae0a1c3cb4aecaff375da36ebf7a63.png)

Este modpack se estará actualizando a lo largo de la serie, añadiendo contenido nuevo y balanceando algunas cosas para que sea una experiencia única. 

### ![nerd](https://cdn.betterttv.net/emote/63a2a01e91ab7f35abe014d7/2x) Cosas a tener en cuenta:
- 8gb de RAM hacia arriba para un rendimiento óptimo, pero si puedes alocar más es mejor, nosotros usamos entre 8 a 16.
- Es extremadamente recomendable el uso del mod [chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) para que pre-carguen los chunks/horizontes y así evitar problemas de rendimiento.
- Tendrás que descargar los [shaders](https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e) por tu cuenta ya que no están disponibles en Modrinth (los que usa rubius son los bliss).
- Es posible jugar multiplayer con el mod que viene incluido (ver el tutorial para más información). 
- Algunos mods están en beta, por lo tanto, puede haber bugs y hacer el juego inestable.
- Si añades tus propios mods no garantizamos que funcione todo bien, pero en principio no debería haber problema.

## Chunky essentials:


**/chunky world [dimension]**

**/chunky center <x> <z>** <- _tus coordenadas_

**/chunky shape circle**

**/chunky radius <1000>** <- _radio en bloques_

**/chunky start**




<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tGtTKCZ9QKg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### English Description:  ![Murica](https://cdn.frankerfacez.com/emote/229486/1)
Horizons is the long awaited modpack of the Rubius series! 
Now you will be able to enjoy all the content of the series with mods like Distant Horizons, Terralith/Tectonic, Iris shaders, Bosses of mass destruction, and more, giving you a vanilla+ experience ![cluless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a564fd55ae0a1c3cb4aecaff375da36ebf7a63.png)

This modpack will be updating throughout the series, adding new content and balancing some things to make it a unique experience. 

**Things to keep in mind:** 
- 8gb of RAM upwards for optimal performance, but if you can set more it's better, we use between 10 to 16.
- It is highly recommended that you use the [chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) mod to get the horizons to load properly and avoid performance problems as the world is so big.
- You will have to download the [Distant Horizons compatible](https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e) Bliss shaders on your own as they are not available in Modrinth.
- Some mods are in beta, therefore, there may be bugs and make the game unstable.
- If you add your own mods we do not guarantee that everything will work fine, but there should be no problem.

## Chunky essentials:


**/chunky world [dimension]**

**/chunky center <x> <z>** <- _your coords_

**/chunky shape [[shape](https://github.com/pop4959/Chunky/wiki/Shapes)]**

**/chunky radius <1000>** <- _radius in blocks_

**/chunky start**

![team](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced17cd83d8a58aa1e588b04dda2a07ff3181706.png)

![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4df606bc4330abc6f8a4759f80e446ab33b7f724.png)
